title: 3 Mistakes Killing Your GDP Week Trades (2026)
description: GDP drops this week — and most traders will get wrecked. Here are the 3 mistakes smart money hunters avoid before a high-impact news event. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups.
script: GDP drops this week. 80% of traders will get wrecked. Here's what the other 20% already know. Mistake number one. Trading INTO the news. Smart money hunts liquidity BEFORE the release — not after. Mistake number two. Ignoring the order block. Price almost always returns to the last bearish or bullish order block before it moves. Mistake number three. No fair value gap on your radar. The FVG is where price snaps back. Miss it — miss the trade. The R2F Trading system stacks all three — liquidity sweep, order block, FVG — before any GDP entry. One confirmation isn't enough. Follow R2F Trading. Daily ICT setups. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
